overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in ancient Greek attire ascending the grand marble staircases of a temple complex during golden hour. The character moves from outdoor stairs through a colonnade and into an inner courtyard before reaching the main temple altar with ritual offerings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide marble staircase toward the temple entrance

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing at the top of the stairs near the temple entrance

white marble statue on pedestal at the landing above
large classical temple with columns and red banners
ornate carved stone railing with decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a grand outdoor marble staircase of an ancient temple complex during golden hour. A classical statue stands at the landing above, and a robed figure is visible near the temple entrance.

entered.detail: classical statue on white marble base surrounded by scattered flower petals

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the landing and turns to ascend the second flight, passing a marble statue adorned with flower offerings. An armored guard descends the stairs on the left as the temple portico with its columns comes into view.

agents.ego_description: walking between the massive marble columns into the temple's covered entranceway

tall fluted marble column with ornate Corinthian capital
decorated wooden ceiling with recessed panels

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered portico, walking between massive marble columns that support a decorated coffered ceiling. Warm sunlight streams through the columns as a guard stands at attention to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple courtyard with mosaic pavement

warm sunlight streams across the mosaic pavement as the character approaches the final staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across the inner courtyard toward the final grand staircase

tall narrow evergreen trees lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Exiting the colonnade, the character enters a sunlit inner courtyard with intricate mosaic pavement and cypress trees lining the sides. The final grand staircase rises ahead toward the main temple as a guard crosses the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: final ceremonial staircase and temple altar

events.description: begins ascending the final grand staircase toward the temple entrance
reaches the top platform with the altar and offerings

agents.ego_description: climbing the final flight of stairs toward the temple altar, passing bronze statues

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the altar platform

entered.detail: large bronze warrior statue flanking the staircase
large bronze warrior statue flanking the staircase
marble platform with red carpet and ritual offerings
ceramic urns and plates with fruit and flowers

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final grand staircase flanked by large bronze warrior statues, with the temple facade backlit by the setting sun. Reaching the top, the character arrives at the altar platform covered with red carpet and ritual offerings, where a guard stands to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from the grand outdoor staircases of an ancient temple complex into the heart of its sun-drenched inner sanctuary. It begins with the character climbing marble steps during the golden hour, passing a classical statue and a robed figure before turning toward a second flight where flower offerings adorn the stone. As the character moves forward, the open air shifts into the sheltered portico, where warm sunlight streams between massive columns beneath a decorated coffered ceiling. The scene then expands into a bright inner courtyard featuring intricate mosaic pavement and cypress trees, leading the way toward a final set of stairs flanked by bronze warrior statues. Finally, the camera follows the character up to the temple facade backlit by the setting sun, arriving at a red-carpeted altar platform laden with ritual offerings.
